## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` are clean
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explained why not)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or commands changed (README / `--help`)
- [ ] For a new command or MCP tool: mutating/destructive actions are clearly labeled
